member_stories.title: Tesla Q2 deliveries top Wall Street estimates
member_stories.description: Tesla reported roughly 462,000 vehicle deliveries for the second quarter, ahead of the analyst consensus of 445,000.

member_stories.title: Tesla beats delivery expectations for Q2
member_stories.description: Tesla's second-quarter delivery figures came in above consensus, driven by strong Model Y demand in China.

member_stories.title: Tesla shares climb after delivery beat
member_stories.description: Shares moved higher in premarket trading following the delivery report, with several desks noting improved China sales.

member_stories.title: Tesla expands robotaxi service to two new metro areas
member_stories.description: Tesla's robotaxi pilot is expanding beyond Austin into Phoenix and Miami, with a limited fleet of Model Y vehicles.

member_stories.title: Tesla robotaxi rides begin in Phoenix
member_stories.description: Riders in Phoenix can now hail a Tesla robotaxi through the company's app, part of a phased regional rollout.

member_stories.title: Regulators to review Tesla robotaxi safety data
member_stories.description: State regulators said they will review incident data from Tesla's robotaxi pilot before approving further expansion.

member_stories.title: Morgan Stanley raises Tesla price target to $310
member_stories.description: Morgan Stanley lifted its Tesla price target, citing optimism about the robotaxi rollout and energy storage growth.

member_stories.title: Wedbush reiterates Tesla outperform rating
member_stories.description: Wedbush analysts kept an outperform rating on Tesla, pointing to autonomy progress as a key catalyst.

member_stories.title: Tesla shares will rise on autonomy progress, analyst says
member_stories.description: One analyst wrote that Tesla shares will rise further as autonomy milestones are reached over the coming quarters.

member_stories.title: Wall Street split on Tesla ahead of earnings
member_stories.description: Price targets on Tesla range widely ahead of earnings, with bulls citing autonomy and bears citing margin pressure.

member_stories.title: Tesla Energy signs large Megapack order
member_stories.description: Tesla's energy division signed a multi-gigawatt-hour Megapack supply agreement with a utility in Texas.

member_stories.title: Tesla Energy backlog grows on utility demand
member_stories.description: Tesla's energy storage backlog has grown this quarter as utilities sign new Megapack contracts.

member_stories.title: Nvidia says Blackwell demand remains stronger than supply
member_stories.description: Nvidia's CEO said Blackwell GPU demand continues to outstrip supply, with cloud providers placing large orders.

member_stories.title: Nvidia: Blackwell orders exceed available supply
member_stories.description: Nvidia executives reiterated that Blackwell chip demand is outpacing production, according to a wire report.

member_stories.title: Nvidia CEO: Blackwell supply still constrained
member_stories.description: Speaking at a conference, Nvidia's CEO said Blackwell supply constraints are expected to ease later this year.

member_stories.title: Cloud giants scramble for Nvidia Blackwell allocation
member_stories.description: Major cloud providers are reportedly competing for larger allocations of Nvidia's Blackwell GPUs.

member_stories.title: Nvidia shares rise on Blackwell demand commentary
member_stories.description: Nvidia shares moved higher after the company's comments on continued strong Blackwell demand.

member_stories.title: US weighs new export limits on Nvidia AI chips to China
member_stories.description: The US government is reportedly considering additional restrictions on Nvidia AI chip sales to China.

member_stories.title: Nvidia China chip sales face fresh scrutiny
member_stories.description: Nvidia's China-specific chip sales are under renewed scrutiny amid ongoing export control discussions.

member_stories.title: Nvidia says it is monitoring export policy changes
member_stories.description: In a statement, Nvidia said it continues to monitor evolving export policy and will comply with any new rules.

member_stories.title: Nvidia earnings expected to show continued data center growth
member_stories.description: Analysts expect Nvidia's upcoming earnings report to show continued strength in data center revenue.

member_stories.title: What to watch in Nvidia's next earnings report
member_stories.description: Analysts are focused on data center revenue growth and gross margin trends heading into Nvidia's earnings.

member_stories.title: Nvidia options market prices in a large earnings move
member_stories.description: Options pricing implies traders expect a large stock move around Nvidia's upcoming earnings release.

member_stories.title: Nvidia expands partnership with major cloud provider
member_stories.description: Nvidia announced an expanded multi-year partnership to supply GPUs for a cloud provider's AI infrastructure.

member_stories.title: Nvidia deepens cloud AI infrastructure deal
member_stories.description: The expanded deal covers new GPU generations for the cloud provider's AI data centers over multiple years.

member_stories.title: AMD launches next-generation MI350 AI accelerator
member_stories.description: AMD unveiled its MI350 AI accelerator chip, claiming improved performance over the prior MI300 generation.

member_stories.title: AMD's new MI350 chip targets Nvidia's data center lead
member_stories.description: AMD's newly announced MI350 accelerator is aimed at large AI training and inference workloads in data centers.

member_stories.title: Early benchmarks show AMD MI350 gains on select workloads
member_stories.description: Independent benchmarks published this week show the MI350 outperforming its predecessor on some AI workloads.

member_stories.title: AMD shares rise on MI350 launch
member_stories.description: AMD shares moved higher following the MI350 launch event and accompanying analyst commentary.

member_stories.title: AMD gains server CPU market share in latest data
member_stories.description: Third-party tracking data shows AMD gained server CPU market share against its main competitor last quarter.

member_stories.title: AMD server chips keep taking share from Intel
member_stories.description: AMD's EPYC server processors continued taking market share, according to newly published industry data.

member_stories.title: Analysts point to AMD server momentum
member_stories.description: Several analysts cited AMD's growing server market share as a positive data point heading into earnings season.

member_stories.title: AMD stock fell because guidance missed expectations
member_stories.description: AMD shares declined after the company issued quarterly guidance that came in below analyst expectations.

member_stories.title: AMD guidance disappoints investors
member_stories.description: AMD's forward guidance for the current quarter fell short of Wall Street's revenue expectations.

member_stories.title: AMD wins multi-year data center supply agreement
member_stories.description: AMD signed a multi-year agreement to supply EPYC processors for a hyperscale data center operator.

member_stories.title: AMD lands large hyperscaler CPU deal
member_stories.description: The new supply agreement covers several years of EPYC processor deliveries to the hyperscale customer.

member_stories.title: AMD data center deal seen as share-gain signal
member_stories.description: Analysts described the new hyperscaler agreement as further evidence of AMD's data center share gains.

member_stories.title: Apple iPhone sales data shows steady demand in China
member_stories.description: Weekly sales tracking data indicates steady iPhone demand in China following recent promotional pricing.

member_stories.title: iPhone demand holds up in China market
member_stories.description: Third-party data suggests iPhone demand in China has remained resilient over the past month.

member_stories.title: Apple supplier orders point to solid iPhone build plan
member_stories.description: Reports from Apple's supply chain indicate production plans consistent with steady iPhone demand this quarter.

member_stories.title: Apple shares tick up on China demand data
member_stories.description: Apple shares edged higher after the release of data pointing to steady iPhone demand in China.

member_stories.title: Apple expands Apple Intelligence features in latest update
member_stories.description: Apple's newest software update adds several Apple Intelligence features, including expanded on-device summarization.

member_stories.title: Apple Intelligence update rolls out to more devices
member_stories.description: The expanded Apple Intelligence feature set is now rolling out to a wider range of eligible devices.

member_stories.title: Developers react to new Apple Intelligence APIs
member_stories.description: Third-party developers are beginning to integrate the newly released Apple Intelligence APIs into their apps.

member_stories.title: Apple supplier reports temporary production disruption
member_stories.description: A key Apple assembly supplier reported a temporary production slowdown due to a regional power outage.

member_stories.title: Apple assembly partner resumes operations after outage
member_stories.description: The affected Apple supplier said operations have resumed after a brief outage-related disruption.

member_stories.title: Apple board authorizes new share buyback program
member_stories.description: Apple's board approved a new multi-billion-dollar share repurchase authorization.

member_stories.title: Apple announces expanded buyback authorization
member_stories.description: The newly approved buyback program expands on Apple's existing share repurchase activity.

member_stories.title: Apple's buyback program among largest in the market
member_stories.description: Apple's newly authorized buyback ranks among the largest repurchase programs of any public company.

member_stories.title: Meta raises AI infrastructure spending forecast
member_stories.description: Meta said it now expects to spend more on AI infrastructure this year than previously forecast.

member_stories.title: Meta lifts capex guidance on AI data center buildout
member_stories.description: The increased spending forecast is tied to Meta's ongoing AI data center expansion, the company said.

member_stories.title: Meta's higher AI spending draws mixed analyst reaction
member_stories.description: Analysts had mixed reactions to Meta's higher AI infrastructure spending forecast, citing both opportunity and margin risk.

member_stories.title: Meta shares fall after capex guidance raise
member_stories.description: Meta shares declined after the company raised its AI infrastructure spending guidance for the year.

member_stories.title: Meta AI spending plans compared to peers
member_stories.description: Meta's updated AI infrastructure spending plans put it among the largest capital spenders in the sector this year.

member_stories.title: Meta unveils next-generation mixed reality headset
member_stories.description: Meta's Reality Labs division showed off a new mixed reality headset targeted at both consumer and enterprise buyers.

member_stories.title: Meta's new headset targets enterprise customers
member_stories.description: The newly unveiled headset includes features aimed specifically at enterprise and productivity use cases.

member_stories.title: Reality Labs losses continue despite new hardware
member_stories.description: Meta's Reality Labs division continues to post losses even as the company ships new hardware, per recent filings.

member_stories.title: Meta advertising revenue tops estimates on AI targeting gains
member_stories.description: Meta's advertising revenue beat analyst estimates, which the company attributed to improved AI-driven ad targeting.

member_stories.title: Meta ad business posts strong quarter
member_stories.description: Meta's core advertising business posted stronger-than-expected results, led by gains in ad pricing.

member_stories.title: Analyst upgrades Meta to buy after ad revenue beat
member_stories.description: One analyst upgraded Meta to a buy rating, citing the advertising revenue beat and improved targeting technology.

member_stories.title: Meta shares jump on advertising strength
member_stories.description: Meta shares rose in after-hours trading following the stronger-than-expected advertising revenue results.

member_stories.title: EU regulators open new inquiry into Meta ad practices
member_stories.description: European Union regulators opened a new inquiry into Meta's advertising data practices under existing digital rules.

member_stories.title: Meta faces fresh EU scrutiny over ad targeting
member_stories.description: The new EU inquiry focuses on how Meta's platforms use user data for advertising targeting.

member_stories.title: Meta says it will cooperate with EU inquiry
member_stories.description: In a statement, Meta said it intends to cooperate fully with the new European Union regulatory inquiry.
